gate: rd-plugin collection-to-context audit (no code gap found)
conclusion: Every audited fact reaches durable wallet-scoped artifacts through the existing pipeline; no reproduced loss, mismatch, or missing correlation field. Per the change rule, no code change was manufactured.

capture.evidence: pending log captured full 3107-char prompt, repository snapshot (branch, commitSha, treeHash, dirtyStateHash), workProvenance envelope with gitArm status, per-event timestamps and sequence

flush_and_readback.evidence: normal flush worker (2239 ops, 421 artifacts); private-scope read-back shows initial_prompt, branch=main, session_kind=interactive (entrypoint), files_changed, turn model=claude-fable-5, started_at/completed_at, event_count; one timed-out batch queued and drained to zero by a concurrent flush

prompt_provenance.evidence: initial-prompt ContentArtifact node present; immutable private-kv content read back (3107 bytes) and sha256 re-verified against ref

retry_idempotency.evidence: deterministic uuidv5 node/edge ids + merge mode; state.json fingerprint skips unchanged re-flush; queue content-hash dedupe + dedupeKey supersede; artifacts if_absent + 409-as-success; merge-semantics probes (3-op and 899-op single batch, same node id) applied all property sets with later-op-wins

home_consumption.evidence: RickydataChatSession session_bridge.v2 node exists for the same claude session (prompt_anatomy_prompts=1, prompt_capture_status=complete, git_branch, repo attribution, commit-correlation arrays); SAME_SESSION in-degree 2 (ClaudeCodeSession + RickydataChatSession); issue-linker join columns (session_id, claude_session_id, branch, issue_refs, issue_refs_slug) verified present on live nodes; no manual export

watch_items: KFDB read-path staleness: during a multi-batch flush window a ClaudeCodeSession property (branch) ACKed by /api/v1/write was not visible to batchGetEntities minutes later, then appeared after a subsequent single-op write; server merge semantics verified correct by direct probes, so this is a KFDB read/visibility concern, not a plugin producer loss
rd-plugin has no voice/browser turn source by design; those turns are produced by Home's session bridge (RickydataChatSession) and joined via the SAME_SESSION star
